caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" printed in gold lettering, and a gold chain sits in a studio setting. He wears professional over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a microphone mounted on a black boom arm. To his left is a white backdrop featuring a repeated logo that says "UNICORN MUSTLE" surrounded by five gold stars. Behind him, a blue sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the desk to his right, a black mug is visible with text that includes "TALK OUT". A small black box with a logo is also present on the desk to his left. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a consistent posture and facial expression, looking slightly to the left, with virtually no visible movement or change in the scene across the frames.
